jsonLd.title: Nykaa is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nykaa. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Chandigarh-based team.

About Nykaa:
Nykaa is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
